dungeon: (MULTI-DUNGEON HIGHLIGHT STREAM) ROTF event-boss feed + several dungeon biomes + an Oryx the Mad fight
source: gameplay video disc_aCAA_5Od6WY (player sillysocks/MilkShake). Contact sheet shows many biomes; chat is dominated by the SERVER-WIDE event/death feed (verbatim) which yielded the event-boss roster + meme-Encounter taunts below.
map: DOCUMENTED biomes across the montage: purple gothic-stone dungeon; dark CRATER boss arenas (Oryx the Mad arena = dark stone crater); green grassy structure area; ORANGE/yellow Egyptian-desert area; purple area with a dark tornado/tree (Twilight-ish); brown dirt circular crater arenas; dark-blue water-tiled serpent room; snowy/icy green area; a RED boss arena with a pixel boss ('I WAS!!!' text). A title card reads 'Many thanks to adfyhasod for all the help!'.

mechanics: DOCUMENTED: ROTF runs a SERVER-WIDE EVENT-BOSS system — bosses 'just spawned' / 'has been defeated! (N/30)' announcements in a global feed (Unicorn/Gargoyle/Mummy/Bat narrators), the /30 counter mirrors a galactic/realm-progress goal. Player line 'why are all events epic here' CONFIRMS the Epic Enemies system applies to event bosses (epic-scaled events). A 'Special Crate' unbox/lootbox system exists (<Loot Notifier> '[player] just unboxed a Special Crate, obtained ...'). When a player is already max-stat, event rewards convert to pots ('You're already maxed. Potion of Speed has been sent to you').
uncertain: Exact attack patterns/HP for the Encounter meme bosses not isolated (only their taunts + spawn/defeat feed). The /30 counter denominator is consistent across Riverborn/God of Reptilians. Which biome maps to which dungeon not individually entered-and-named in this sample (montage only).
confidence: HIGH for the meme-Encounter taunts (Breathing/Smashing/Shadow, verbatim) + the event-boss roster + the /30 event-counter + epic-events + Special-Crate system (all DOCUMENTED from chat). MEDIUM for biome->dungeon mapping (contact-sheet only).
